title: psyllium scabrum subsp. orientale
intro: Psyllium scabrum subsp. orientale, also known as Indian psyllium or oriental psyllium, is a plant-based member of the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) that is native to parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Psyllium scabrum subsp. orientale include its ability to support digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and aid in the management of blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Psyllium scabrum subsp. orientale is often used as a powder or extract, and can be taken internally to promote gut health and overall well-being.
